query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, screen_size, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND screen_size IS NOT NULL AND screen_size != '' AND REGEXP_REPLACE(screen_size, '[^0-9.]', '', 'g') != '' AND (CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(screen_size, '[^0-9.]', '', 'g') AS NUMERIC) < 5 OR CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(screen_size, '[^0-9.]', '', 'g') AS NUMERIC) > 120)

error_message: TV 가격이 $50~$50000 범위 벗어남 ($50 미만은 액세서리 의심)
query: SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_datetime, final_sku_price, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND final_sku_price IS NOT NULL AND final_sku_price != '' AND final_sku_price LIKE '$%%' AND (CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), '/', 1), ',', ''), ' ', '') AS NUMERIC) < 50 OR CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), '/', 1), ',', ''), ' ', '') AS NUMERIC) > 50000)

SELECT id, item, account_name, page_type, crawl_strdatetime, final_sku_price, product_url FROM {table} WHERE DATE({date_col}) = %s AND final_sku_price IS NOT NULL AND final_sku_price LIKE '$%%' AND final_sku_price NOT ILIKE '%%/month%%' AND final_sku_price NOT ILIKE '%%/mo%%' AND REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), '/', 1), ',', ''), ' ', '') ~ '^[0-9.]+$' AND (CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), '/', 1), ',', ''), ' ', '') AS NUMERIC) < 10 OR CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(SPLIT_PART(REPLACE(final_sku_price, '$', ''), '/', 1), ',', ''), ' ', '') AS NUMERIC) > 3000)

condition: event_offset이 연속적이지 않은 경우 (중간 주차 누락)
error_message: event_offset이 연속적이지 않은 경우 (중간 주차 누락)
query: WITH ordered_data AS (SELECT product_name, event, metric_type, event_offset, event_value, crawled_at, LAG(event_offset) OVER (PARTITION BY product_name, event ORDER BY event_offset) as prev_offset FROM {table} WHERE DATE(crawled_at) = %s) SELECT product_name, event, metric_type, event_offset, prev_offset, event_value, crawled_at FROM ordered_data WHERE prev_offset IS NOT NULL AND event_offset - prev_offset > 1 ORDER BY product_name, event, event_offset
SELECT product_name, event, metric_type, event_offset, event_value, crawled_at FROM {table} WHERE DATE(crawled_at) = %s AND event_value = 0 ORDER BY product_name, event, event_offset
SELECT id, item, account_name, sku, screen_size, product_url FROM {table} WHERE is_product = true AND (screen_size IS NULL OR screen_size = '')
SELECT id, item, account_name, sku, hhp_storage, product_url FROM {table} WHERE is_product = true AND (hhp_storage IS NULL OR hhp_storage = '')
